query:
INSERT INTO unique_ext_jwt_token (jwt_hash, last_used_at, email, username, is_admin, is_operator, workspace_id, label, scopes)
         VALUES ($1, NOW(), $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7, $8)
         ON CONFLICT (jwt_hash)
         DO UPDATE SET last_used_at = NOW(), email = $2, username = $3, is_admin = $4, is_operator = $5, workspace_id = $6, label = $7, scopes = $8
